title: Livestock management system with audio support
abstract: A voice controlled virtual assistant usable by livestock management or workers is disclosed. Information received via a cloud connected device can include veterinary related questions, curated answers, or access to individual animal health records. The animal support system can actively provide information derived from information received through the cloud connected device, including warnings derived from audio monitoring of animal condition. In some embodiments, the cloud connected device can interact with additional sensors that monitor animal condition, capture animal images, or provide electronically available animal tag identification or sensor information.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed: 1. A method for providing animal related services to animal professionals, the method comprising the steps of: monitoring audio information using a cloud connected device supporting voice detection and voice response, the voice detection and voice response provided by an animal support system; supporting audio request for information receipt and information data input on the cloud connected device; and providing audio monitoring of animal condition. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the cloud connected device is a voice controlled virtual assistant. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the animal professionals are livestock workers. 4. The method of claim 1 , wherein information received can include veterinary related questions. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein information received can include curated answers. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the animal support system can provide access to individual animal health records. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the animal support system can actively provide information derived from information received through the cloud connected device. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the animal support system can actively provide warnings derived from audio monitoring of animal condition. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein the cloud connected device can interact with additional sensors monitoring animal condition. 10. The method of claim 1, wherein the cloud connected device can further monitor animal condition using images received by the cloud connected device. 11. The method of claim 1, wherein the cloud connected device can further monitor animal condition using electronic tags associated with an animal to monitor animal condition. 12. The method of claim 1, wherein food release to an animal is controlled by the animal support system. 13. The method of claim 1, wherein at least one environmental condition for an animal is controlled by the animal support system. 14. The method of claim 1, wherein provision of medicine to an animal is controlled by the animal support system.
